title: Pin Tasks and Subtasks to a "Do Today" section
excerpt: Feature request: allowing tasks and subtasks to be “pinned” to a sort of “to do” list for a duration of time. Example, looking through the board in the morning and selecting three or four tasks for that day, then pinning…

posts.author: CTruelove (Christopher)
posts.cookedHtml: Feature request: allowing tasks and subtasks to be “pinned” to a sort of “to do” list for a duration of time. Example, looking through the board in the morning and selecting three or four tasks for that day, then pinning them to this “to do” list or board so that my attention is focused only on those three or four items, instead of having to search for them again within the many items on my normal board.

posts.author: jailynnlucidday (Jai-Lynn Hoops)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @CTruelove !

My Work is a great way to help get you that “Do Today” list. It pulls from your full account and allows you to see everything that you have been assigned to in the people column in every board that you are subscribed to.

Monday also has a great article about it here.

Hope this helps!
